TestCase.name: testSingleFilterScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: SELECT '2025' FROM emp WHERE empno = 1 UNION SELECT '2024' FROM emp WHERE empno = 1

LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=['2025']) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=['2024']) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

TestCase.name: testTwoFilterScanSuggestions
TestCase.Resource: SELECT '2025' FROM emp WHERE empno = 1 UNION SELECT '2024' FROM emp WHERE empno = 1 UNION SELECT '2023' FROM emp WHERE empno = 2 UNION SELECT '2022' FROM emp WHERE empno = 2

LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=['2025']) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=['2024']) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=['2023']) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=['2022']) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSingleProjectFilterScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: SELECT ename FROM emp WHERE empno = 1 UNION SELECT ename FROM emp WHERE empno = 1

LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSingleAggregateProjectScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COUNT(*), 'A' FROM emp GROUP BY ename UNION SELECT COUNT(*), 'B' FROM emp GROUP BY ename

LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$1], EXPR$1=['A']) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$1], EXPR$1=['B']) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSingleAggregateProjectFilterScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COUNT(*), 'A' FROM emp WHERE empno > 50 GROUP BY ename UNION SELECT COUNT(*), 'B' FROM emp WHERE empno > 50 GROUP BY ename

LogicalUnion(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$1], EXPR$1=['A']) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 50)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$1], EXPR$1=['B']) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 50)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 50)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSingleProjectJoinScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: WITH cx AS (SELECT e.empno, d.dname FROM emp e INNER JOIN dept d ON e.deptno = d.deptno) SELECT * FROM cx WHERE cx.empno > 50 INTERSECT SELECT * FROM cx WHERE cx.empno < 100

LogicalIntersect(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 50)]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$4]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[<($0, 100)]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$4]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]])
LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$4]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]])

TestCase.name: testSingleProjectFilterJoinScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: WITH cx AS (SELECT e.empno, d.dname FROM emp e INNER JOIN dept d ON e.deptno = d.deptno WHERE d.dname = 'Sales') SELECT * FROM cx WHERE cx.empno > 50 INTERSECT SELECT * FROM cx WHERE cx.empno < 100

LogicalIntersect(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 50)]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$4]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($4, 'Sales')]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[<($0, 100)]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$4]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($4, 'Sales')]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]])
LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], DNAME=[$4]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($4, 'Sales')]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]])

TestCase.name: testSingleAggregateProjectFilterJoinScanSuggestion
TestCase.Resource: WITH cx AS (SELECT ename, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM emp e INNER JOIN dept d ON e.deptno = d.deptno WHERE d.dname = 'Sales' GROUP BY ename) SELECT * FROM cx WHERE cnt > 50 INTERSECT SELECT * FROM cx WHERE cnt < 100

LogicalIntersect(all=[false]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$0], CNT=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($1, 50)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], CNT=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($4, 'Sales')]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$0], CNT=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[<($1, 100)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], CNT=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($4, 'Sales')]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]])

LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], CNT=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(ENAME=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($4, 'Sales')]) LogicalJoin(condition=[=($2, $3)], joinType=[inner]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[DEPT]])
